title: Snowy's Easy Trolling
description: This datapack adds three features that makes trolling much easier and funnier.
body:
There are currently three features:

- Renaming a stick to "TNT Wand"(no quotation marks) will allow you to right click and turn the block you are looking at into tnt(alter some bases maybe...?)
- Renaming a stick to "Instant Wand" will allow you to right click and make the block you look at explode.
- Renaming an anvil(NOT A BROKEN OR CHIPPED ANVIL) to "Anvil Bomb" will allow you to right click and summon a 11(x) * 2(y) * 11(z) area of anvil above you. It won't damage you as an iron block is also set above your head.

Currently for 1.19.x
